common.title: Israeli Bank Scraper
common.prototype_note: This is a local-only prototype. Credentials are sent directly to the local backend.
common.maintenance_desc: System maintenance tools and database management.
common.sidebar_placeholder: Sidebar content available in Scrape view
common.auto_detection_hint: Leave blank to attempt automatic detection from file content
common.automation_desc: Schedule and trigger automated scraper runs

scheduler.title: Scheduler
scheduler.run_time_desc: Time of day in the server's local timezone.
scheduler.interval_anchor_desc: Runs on this date, then every N days after.
scheduler.custom_cron_desc: Five fields: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (same as standard cron).
scheduler.backup_standalone_desc: Runs on its own schedule, independent of scrapes. Uses the same options (daily, weekly, monthly, every N days, or custom cron).
scheduler.backup_desc: Scheduled backups run independently of scrapes.
scheduler.aboutDescription: The scheduler runs on the server. Make sure the container is running during the scheduled time. Notifications will be sent according to your global pipeline settings.

scraper.smart_start_date_desc: Automatically start from the last successful scrape date
scraper.smart_start_date_active: ✨ Smart start date active (will start from last successful scrape)
scraper.show_browser_desc: Open browser window during scrape (useful for debugging)
scraper.verbose_desc: Include more debug info in the output logs.
scraper.combine_installments_desc: Merge installments into a single transaction
scraper.start_date_hint: Leave empty to use library default
scraper.scrape_success: Scrape completed successfully! Check the results panel.
scraper.custom_opt_in_help: Add specific feature flags by name (comma separated)
scraper.isracard_block_tip: Isracard often blocks automated requests. Try enabling "Show Browser" in Advanced Options to bypass basic bot detection.
scraper.config_desc: Configure global scraper behavior and defaults

analyst.title: AI Analyst
analyst.ask_me: Ask me anything about these {{count}} transactions!

table.reset_all_desc: This will clear all categories, filters, internal transfers, and ignored transaction settings. Rebuilds DB from source files.
table.confirm_reset_all: Are you sure you want to reset all user modifications (categories, filters, ignoring) back to defaults? This cannot be undone.

maintenance.reload_desc: This will clear all transactions from the unified database and re-import them from the existing JSON files in the results folder.
maintenance.confirm_reload: Are you sure you want to reload the database from files? This will overwrite any unsynced changes.
maintenance.reset_success: All changes have been reset to defaults
maintenance.backup_desc: Create local or Google Drive backups and restore from existing snapshots.
maintenance.backup_select_drive_first: Select a Google Drive backup first.
maintenance.backup_confirm_restore_local: Restore from selected local backup? This will replace current data.
maintenance.backup_confirm_restore_drive: Restore from selected Google Drive backup? This will replace current data.
maintenance.backup_confirm_restore_upload: Restore from uploaded backup file? This will replace current data.
maintenance.backup_restore_drive_success: Restore completed from Google Drive backup.
maintenance.backup_restore_upload_success: Restore completed from uploaded backup file.
maintenance.backup_restore_restart_notice: The database was restored. The page will reload to apply changes.

categorization.banner_detail: {{error}} Cached categories were applied where possible.

app_lock.locked_title: Application locked — scraping and saving new profiles are disabled
app_lock.locked_body: Enter your app password below to unlock. Scheduled scrapes, Telegram /scrape, and the Run scrape button stay off until you unlock (the rest of the dashboard stays available).
app_lock.unlocked_hint: Scraping and new profiles are allowed for this session.
app_lock.not_configured_hint: Optional: set an app password to require unlock before bank scrapes or adding profiles.

ai_settings.title: AI Configuration
ai_settings.recategorize_all_desc: Iterate through all transactions in the database and attempt to categorize them using AI. This uses the allowed categories list above.
ai_settings.recategorize_ai_failed: AI categorization failed: {{error}}. Still updated {{count}} rows from cache where possible.

analytics.no_data: No transactions to analyze. Select a result file first.
analytics.click_hint: Click a chart item to drill down
analytics.merchants_subtitle: Where your money goes most often

google_settings.title: Google Drive Setup
google_settings.description: Obtain these from the Google Cloud Console.
google_settings.redirect_uri_hint: Must match the Authorized redirect URI in Google Console.
google_settings.browseFolderHelp: Browse and select a folder for auto-organization
google_settings.noFoldersInDrive: No folders found in Google Drive

google_sheets.title: Google Sheets
google_sheets.not_configured: Sync to Sheets is not configured yet.
google_sheets.connect_desc: Connect to your Google account to sync transactions.
google_sheets.select_hint: Select a scrape result to sync
google_sheets.connection_error_prompt: Your Google Drive connection has a problem. Connect again to re-authorize.

post_scrape.title: Post-Scrape Actions
post_scrape.ignore_pending_desc: Do not enter and delete existing from DB transactions in pending status
post_scrape.fraud_notify_help: Run fraud checks after each scrape. Requires either local rules or AI access.
post_scrape.fraud_notify_toggle: Notify when potential fraud is detected
post_scrape.telegram_aggregate: Combine Telegram notifications (one message per run)
post_scrape.telegram_aggregate_desc: Merges scrape status, post-scrape insights, and spending digest lines into a single Telegram message when Telegram is enabled.
post_scrape.whale_where: Whale alerts (unusually large single expenses) appear here under Dashboard → bell alerts, and in the combined Telegram message when Spending digest is enabled in Telegram settings.
post_scrape.notification_help: Choose which channels receive post-scrape messages.

errors.custom_query_required: Custom AI query is required when custom mode is enabled

fraud_settings.title: Fraud & Alerts
fraud_settings.description: Configure local and AI-based fraud detection rules, thresholds, and alerts.
fraud_settings.overview_desc: Choose how fraud is detected after each scrape and when alerts should fire.
fraud_settings.rule_outlier_amount_desc: Flag charges much higher than historical amounts for the same description.
fraud_settings.rule_new_merchant_desc: Highlight expensive transactions from merchants never seen before.
fraud_settings.rule_rapid_repeats_desc: Detect multiple similar charges in a short time window.
fraud_settings.rule_foreign_currency_desc: Flag large non-ILS charges that may be unexpected.
fraud_settings.version_help: Optionally bump this when you change thresholds in a way that reinterprets scores.

dashboard.title: Financial Command Center
dashboard.select_data: Select transaction files to view your financial dashboard
dashboard.select_hint: Choose files from the sidebar to start analyzing
dashboard.recurring_hint: Recurring items are detected from your transaction history
dashboard.transfers_excluded: {{amount}} excluded from expense totals to prevent double-counting
dashboard.transfer_explanation: These are credit card settlement payments from your bank account. The individual card transactions are already counted as expenses, so these lump-sum payments are excluded to avoid double-counting.
dashboard.no_txns_month: No transactions found for this month

budget_health_msg.pace_much_faster: Spending much faster than historical average.

velocity.msg: Spending in {{category}} is ahead of your usual pace for this point in the month.

outlier.msg: {{category}} is trending well above your typical monthly level.

whale.msg_with_avg: One expense of {{amount}} is much larger than your typical {{category}} charge (~{{avgAmount}}).
whale.msg_no_avg: One expense of {{amount}} stands out in {{category}} this month.

dashboard.cc_billing_desc: Set the day of the month your credit cards are cleared. Used for more accurate projections.
dashboard.message_spending_much_faster_than_histor: Spending much faster than historical average.
dashboard.forecast_calculation: Based on current daily pace and historical baseline
dashboard.ask_ai_placeholder: Ask about your spending habits, trends or specific anomalies...
dashboard.ai_disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Please verify important financial information.
dashboard.subscription_hint: Mark regular transactions as subscriptions in their details modal.
dashboard.no_history_details: No detailed history available for this item
dashboard.forecast_details_modal_hint: Open for transaction pace vs. monthly average and full calculation
dashboard.no_transactions: No transactions found for this calculation.
dashboard.forecast_window_desc: Months of data used to compute spending averages. Capped to your available data.
dashboard.cc_patterns_desc: Transactions flagged as CC payments. Remove to stop auto-detection.
dashboard.method_transaction_count_detail: {{remainingDays}} days left in the month. The forecast expects {{forecastTxnCount}} more transactions. At ~{{avgTxnValue}} ₪ per transaction.
dashboard.forecast_explanation: Extra variable spending projected for the next {{count}} days, beyond bills we already detected.
dashboard.forecast_how_body: Only for the current calendar month: for each variable category we use your last {{months}} month(s) of history. We estimate N (typical expense txns/month) and average debit per txn. The raw gap is (N − current txns) × avg per txn, but we cap how many extra txns we assume by the share of the month left: at most N × (days left ÷ days in month). We take the lower of the gap and that cap, then multiply by avg per txn. If you already reached N txns, we add nothing. Categories without a baseline use (spent so far ÷ days elapsed) × days left. The total is only the portion above known upcoming bills per category.
dashboard.txn_pace_modal_current: {{current}} expense transactions so far vs ~{{expected}} expected by today (pro‑rated from your long‑term average of {{avg}} transactions per month).
dashboard.txn_pace_modal_past: {{current}} expense transactions this month · historical average {{avg}} transactions per month.
dashboard.forecast_disclaimer: Estimates only; they change as new transactions arrive.
dashboard.no_transactions_month: No transactions found for this month
dashboard.forecast_extra_vs_bills: Extra forecast vs. known upcoming bills
dashboard.subscriptions_logic_intro: Subscriptions are detected from transaction behavior and your manual overrides:
dashboard.subscriptions_logic_rule_manual: Manual mark in transaction details always wins and sets the interval.
dashboard.subscriptions_logic_rule_pattern: Auto-detection requires repeating timing with similar amounts and merchant text.
dashboard.subscriptions_logic_rule_exclusions: Ignored/internal-transfer/installment transactions and excluded items are skipped.
dashboard.subscriptions_logic_rule_active: Old patterns are hidden when they look inactive for their billing interval.
dashboard.detectionAnalyzesHistory: Analyzes your entire transaction history to find consistent patterns:
dashboard.detectionRuleDescriptionMultiMonth: Description appears in multiple months (3 of last 4)
dashboard.detectionRuleEstimatedDate: Estimated date based on past occurrences (+/-3 days)

ai_chat.greeting: Hello! I am your AI financial analyst. I can help answer questions about your spending habits, trends, or anomalies. What would you like to know?
ai_chat.error: Sorry — I hit an error while analyzing your data. Please try again.

ai_logs.title: AI Logs
ai_logs.confirm_clear_all: Clear all AI logs? This cannot be undone.

telegram.token_help: Get your token from @BotFather on Telegram
telegram.why_bot_not_started: Why the bot did not start
telegram.chat_id_placeholder: Enter chat ID or group ID
telegram.chat_id_help: Typically starts with - for groups or is a number for private chats
telegram.notification_chats_help: Select which chats should receive transaction notifications
telegram.allowed_users_help: Only listed Telegram user IDs can use the bot.
telegram.bot_language_help: Select the Telegram bot interface language.
telegram.spending_digest_help: Send a short budget pace, whale, and other alert lines to notification chats after each successful scrape (skipped if nothing changed). Same signals as the dashboard bell.
telegram.warning_no_users_desc: The bot will reject all commands until at least one user is added.

profiles.title: Saved Profiles
profiles.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this profile?

env.title: Environment Variables
env.subtitle: Configure system-level settings stored in .env
env.profile_encryption_note: Saved bank credentials are encrypted with your app password (set via the strip under the header). If you still have ENCRYPTION_KEY in .env from an older setup, unlock once after upgrade — profiles are re-encrypted automatically and you can remove that variable.
env.restart_required_hint: Changes to these variables require a server restart to take effect.
env.confirm_restart_after_save: Settings saved. Restart server now to apply?
env.restart_in_progress: Server is restarting. Please refresh the page in a few seconds.

google_client_secret.label: Google Client Secret
google_client_secret.help: Found in the same Google Cloud Console project.

google_redirect_uri.label: Google Redirect URI
google_redirect_uri.help: Must match the authorized redirect URI in Cloud Console (e.g., {{example}})

drive_folder_id.label: Drive Folder ID
drive_folder_id.help: The ID from the URL of your Google Drive folder where results will be saved.

data_dir.label: Data Directory
data_dir.help: Path where profiles and results are stored. Default is ./data

validation.encryption_key_hex_64: Encryption key must be a 64-character hex string

scrape_progress.empty: Start a scrape to see real-time progress here.
